tools.name: code.call
tools.description: preferred repo-scoped execution tool for focused tests, package scripts, typechecks, syntax checks, and short Python, Bun, or Bash programs inside the Consuelo OS runtime; use this instead of mac.call when a taskSession/task worktree exists
